children.title: friday 1/30/26
children.description:
Friday 1/30 — Period B:

 	 
Content	Topic 4.9 — Combining RVs (Variance Trap)
Videos	~18 min (2 videos)
Assign	Quiz 4.7-4.8 + Drill 4.9
Due	Quiz 4.6
Time	55 min

The "Variance Trap" — this is where students learn:

Means add: μ(X+Y) = μX + μY
Variances add (if independent): σ²(X+Y) = σ²X + σ²Y
Standard deviations do NOT add ← the trap
